divergence: The postal service achieved faster-than-light delivery but only for junk mail
story_angle: official denial that accidentally confirms everything, quoted at length
headline: MINISTRY OF INTERSTELLAR POST CONFIRMS FTL JUNK MAIL PULVERIZES EIGHTEEN, DENIES ALL INJURIES WITH SCIENTIFIC PRECISION
deck: Coupon misery outweighs corporeal despair as bureaucratic minutiae overshadow the ash-pale casualties.
article:
In an unprecedented display of statistical rigor, the Ministry of Interstellar Post categorically denied any responsibility for the pulverization of eighteen citizens during the recent visit of Minister Zykov to Plaza of Ascendant Coupons. The event, which tragically coincided with a scheduled delivery of coupon books, has been meticulously documented for review.

"At 13:47:12 Galactic Standard Time, a titanium coupon book weighing precisely 4.7 kilograms was delivered at 1.3 times the speed of light, leading to the regrettable buckling of eight-foot doorways," stated Deputy Director Petrovna Zakhrova with an unwavering gaze. "Injury statistics remain classified as negligible under Chapter Three, Article Seven of the Interstellar Delivery Protocol, which expressly states that any lacerations as a result of paper-based injuries are non-scarring and temporary."

Witnesses claim to have seen citizens with twin-pupiled amber eyes treated for superficial paper lacerations that vanish before one can complete the phrase 'glorious coupon savings.' Personal letters, with important communiqués languishing in the cosmic void, continue to orbit the Meridian Halo, while the heroic worker quotas for bulk mail are met with ecstatic applause in bureaucratic circles.

The Minister himself remains unscathed, remaining steadfast behind his podium of soaring concrete, affirming, "Our commitment to postal excellence shall never be undermined, even if that excellence arrives wrapped in an express mail catastrophe!"
author: Sergei Fyodorovich Dronov, Senior Correspondent of Ministry Affairs

weather.condition: Junk mail showers expected, stay indoors

oped.title: FTL Coupons: The True Vanguard of Progress
oped.author: Marshal Igor K. Blatnov, Emeritus Chair of Interstellar Stamp Theory at the Academy of Glorious Redirection
oped.body: Comrades, let us not weep for those eighteen who inconveniently intersected our Ministry’s breakthrough. Faster-than-light junk mail is the proud achievement of socialist science; every pulverized citizen simply failed to wear the regulation lead-lined ushanka prescribed in Circular 47-B. Their bare heads acted as primitive antennas, an act of personal negligence now cynically rebranded as tragedy. The real scandal is that my own eagerly awaited tractor-coupon catalog never arrived, forcing me to purchase fuel at full price like some decadent capitalist. The Ministry’s denial of injury is therefore not callous but rigorously precise: no living recipient has filed a proper triplicate form. To prevent future mishaps I propose every household install a mandatory mail-deflection satellite the size of a small dacha—cost to be deducted from funeral stipends. Progress demands sacrifice; my coupons demand priority.

classifieds.text: Ministry of Interstellar Post urgently seeks senior clerk to draft eighteen identical denial letters proving FTL coupons cause no injuries. Must possess own abacus and willingness to ignore ash.
For sale: one slightly flattened apartment block in Sector 9, complete with eighteen sets of unclaimed coupons. Seller relocating to slower dimension after precise bureaucratic incident.
Comrade Petrov hereby confesses his mailbox may have accelerated the tragic yet mathematically impossible pulverization of neighbors. All injuries are denied with full scientific rigor.
Seeking attorney to file claim against Ministry for loss of eighteen relatives and one dignity. Payment in surviving junk mail coupons only; no FTL deliveries accepted.

panels.caption: Ministry confirms: eighteen vaporized by FTL grocery circulars at 9:17 this morning.
Comrade Director: 'Our equations prove zero injuries—only precise matter redistribution.'
Widow: 'My husband is a smoking hole.' Director: 'Then he qualifies for the next catalog.'

joke.setup: Ministry spokesmen confirmed that the FTL junk mail had indeed pulverized eighteen citizens at 1.3c.
joke.punchline: They added that no injuries occurred, because the victims had neglected to submit Form 47-B requesting exemption from incoming propaganda.
joke.text: Ministry spokesmen confirmed that the FTL junk mail had indeed pulverized eighteen citizens at 1.3c. They added that no injuries occurred, because the victims had neglected to submit Form 47-B requesting exemption from incoming propaganda.

sponsor_ads.headline: MINISTRY-CERTIFIED FTL JUNK MAIL DEFLECTOR CREAM
sponsor_ads.body: Rub this odorless paste on your doorway each morning and watch interstellar coupons glance harmlessly aside, achieving precisely the same zero-injury outcome documented in today’s official release.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Eighteen comrades already tested; results classified as non-events.

sponsor_ads.headline: COMRADES! REROUTE YOUR NEIGHBOR’S FTL MAIL FOR THE PLAN
sponsor_ads.body: Our five-year redirection service beams unwanted credit offers straight into the next housing block, ensuring the Ministry’s scientific precision applies to someone else.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Denials issued in triplicate; pulverization not guaranteed but statistically adjacent.

sponsor_ads.headline: NEW! POSTAL HERO HELMET WITH BUILT-IN DENIAL DIAL
sponsor_ads.body: Calibrated to register only the exact non-injuries confirmed by the Ministry, this helmet lets mail carriers continue deliveries while the dial stays fixed at zero casualties.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Batteries not included; lawsuits reclassified as junk mail.

sponsor_ads.headline: PUBLIC SERVICE: FREE SCIENTIFIC PADDING FOR ALL HOUSEHOLDS
sponsor_ads.body: Collect your Ministry-issue impact quilt today; it absorbs FTL brochures at velocities proven to produce exactly eighteen non-injuries and no more.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Valid only until the next confirmed non-event.

stories.headline: MINISTRY PHYSICISTS RECORD JUNK MAIL IMPACT AT 1.000017C WITH ZERO RESIDUAL TRAUMA
stories.deck: Eighteen coupon recipients reduced to administrative footnotes after titanium bundles arrive ahead of schedule.
stories.byline: Arthur Kelvin Harrington, Senior Science Correspondent
stories.article:
Comrades at the Fenune Velocity Institute confirmed yesterday that FTL coupons dispatched from the Meridian Halo presses attained speeds sufficient to collapse municipal post boxes into compact ingots. Laboratory scales registered no deviation from approved injury classifications despite the casualties.

Further tests established that personal letters remain confined to sub-light lanes, preserving the distinction between official circulars and private correspondence. The ministry noted that any perceived harm constitutes an acceptable margin of bureaucratic friction.

stories.headline: STATE FARMS REPORT SEED PACKETS ARRIVING VIA FTL COUPONS YIELD RECORD HARVESTS OF PAPER FIBRE
stories.deck: Brutalist silos now contain more shredded advertisements than actual grain after one week of interstellar promotions.
stories.article:
Collective farms on Fenune's outer districts have logged unprecedented volumes of glossy seed catalogues materialising inside combine harvesters at superluminal velocities. Workers note the soil now supports dense layers of discount vouchers rather than the planned root vegetables.

Ministry quotas for paper reclamation have been raised accordingly, with tractor operators instructed to treat each bundle as an official delivery of improved mulch. No complaints have been registered concerning the absence of actual grain.

real_world_echo: obliquely mirrors 'Explosions injure 18 in Damascus during Macron's visit' by recasting FTL junk-mail packets as the 'explosive' deliveries that strike during a ceremonial visit
